# UC-12.3.19 · AWX Inventory Sync From Cloud Source Failures

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Fault, Configuration &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch this part of your delivery chain for risks and reliability so issues show up before they hit customers.*

---

## Description

Stale dynamic inventory causes runs against wrong hosts or empty limits.

## Value

Detects SCM/cloud inventory sync failures before job templates target empty groups.

## Implementation

Map `inventory_id` to human name via lookup. Watch for cloud API throttling.

## SPL

```spl
index=automation sourcetype="awx:job_events" OR sourcetype="awx:server"
| search "inventory" AND ("sync" OR "update") AND ("fail" OR "error" OR "403" OR "429")
| stats latest(_time) as last_err, count by inventory_id, source
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (inventory × source), Single value (open failures).

## Known False Positives

Alerts from scheduled scans, pilot repositories, or vendor API throttling during bulk operations.

## References

- [AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)](https://github.com/ansible/awx/blob/devel/docs/logging_integration.md)
- [Splunk HEC — HTTP Event Collector](https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Data/UsetheHTTPEventCollector)
